author: lOrm
content: #663 closed. Added /mcp, /mcp enable, /mcp disable, /mcp reconnect to MANAGEMENT section of src/slash_commands.rs — bare /mcp opens the settings overlay; sub-commands match CC's MCPSettings TUI dispatch. Surface registration is in place; the actual MCPSettings TUI overlay depends on #520 overlay framework + #522 LspManager service and is tracked separately.
